description: GitHub Copilot integration for Teach Me learning system

agents.name: teachme.philosophy
agents.description: Create personalized learning philosophy based on your preferences

agents.name: teachme.define
agents.description: Define a new skill with learning objectives and prerequisites

agents.name: teachme.assess
agents.description: Assess your current knowledge level with diagnostic tests

agents.name: teachme.roadmap
agents.description: Create comprehensive learning roadmap with resources and timeline

agents.name: teachme.validate
agents.description: Validate learning path for consistency and completeness

agents.name: teachme.modules
agents.description: Break roadmap into detailed learning modules with exercises

agents.name: teachme.learn
agents.description: Execute learning plan with AI-guided study, practice, and feedback
